summary.key_theme: 公司持續推動再生能源轉型與基礎設施升級，並憑藉穩健的股息政策與市場表現獲得投資人青睞。

bullish.title: Here's Why You Should Add Duke Energy Stock to Your Portfolio Now
bullish.reason: 強調 DUK 具備強大的股息吸引力、穩健的營運表現，以及龐大的基礎設施與再生能源投資計畫，長期投資價值顯著。

bullish.title: Duke Energy Solar Expansion And Grants Put Valuation And Earnings In Focus
bullish.reason: 公司啟動 Ebbie 太陽能專案，顯示其在再生能源轉型上的實質進展，有助於提升長期估值與獲利能力。

bullish.title: Duke Energy Clean Energy Program Exceeds Enrollment Targets in North Carolina
bullish.reason: 綠色能源計畫 GSA Express 超額達成目標，反映市場對其清潔能源服務需求強勁，有利於營收成長。

bullish.title: Duke Energy Carolinas Deal Tests Regulatory Support For Efficiency And Growth
bullish.reason: 達成合併營運的協議，預期能提升營運效率並獲得監管支持，對長期成本控制與成長空間有利。

bullish.title: Duke Energy Corporation (DUK) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
bullish.reason: 市場分析師對 DUK 持看漲觀點，增強投資人信心。

bullish.title: Duke Energy invests $500,000 to strengthen storm preparedness across North Carolina
bullish.reason: 透過基金會投入 50 萬美元強化風災準備，有助於提升品牌形象與基礎設施韌性。

bullish.title: Duke Energy partners with colleges to train next generation of lineworkers
bullish.reason: 與大學合作培訓技術人員，確保未來勞動力供應，對長期營運穩定性有正面影響。

bullish.title: Flowserve Adds Duke Energy CFO To Board As Governance Focus Grows
bullish.reason: DUK 財務長 Brian Savoy 加入 Flowserve 董事會，顯示其專業能力受外部肯定，對公司治理形象有加分。

bearish.title: Duke Energy (DUK) Falls More Steeply Than Broader Market: What Investors Need to Know
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 2.26 %，表現弱於大盤，反映短期賣壓與市場情緒波動。

bearish.title: Duke Energy (DUK) to Raise $1B Through Convertible Senior Notes
bearish.reason: 發行 10 億美元可轉換公司債可能導致股權稀釋風險，短期內對現有股東造成心理壓力。

neutral.title: Duke Energy Corp. stock outperforms competitors despite losses on the day
neutral.reason: 雖然當日股價下跌，但相對競爭對手表現仍具韌性，屬於市場常態波動。

neutral.title: Monitor energy use with alerts - ahead of the summer heat
neutral.reason: 推廣能源使用警示計畫，屬於公用事業的日常客戶服務與需求管理，對股價影響有限。

neutral.title: Investors Heavily Search Duke Energy Corporation (DUK): Here is What You Need to Know
neutral.reason: 僅反映投資人搜尋熱度增加，未包含具體財務利多或利空消息。

neutral.title: Is Duke Energy (DUK) Outperforming Other Utilities Stocks This Year?
neutral.reason: 屬於行業績效比較分析，提供投資人參考資訊，無直接股價驅動因素。

neutral.title: Duke Energy Corporation (DUK) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
neutral.reason: 與 Yahoo 報導內容重複，作為市場觀點彙整，不具備額外影響力。

neutral.title: Duke Energy helps customers in South Carolina advance sustainability goals through expanded clean energy initiatives
neutral.reason: 與太陽能專案報導內容重複，屬於同一事件的重複報導。
